title: Sendign Pictures with commentaries
excerpt:
When automating the email delivery of a photo containing comments (this occurs via a shared link), the received photo does not include the blue tags that indicate the specific locations of each comment within the image. 
…

posts.author: nparducci (Nicolas F Parducci)
posts.cookedHtml:
When automating the email delivery of a photo containing comments (this occurs via a shared link), the received photo does not include the blue tags that indicate the specific locations of each comment within the image.

I kindly request the development of this feature to ensure the tags are retained and visible in the emailed photo for better context and usability.
